summary: Refine plans/demo-plan.md into a proper plan

local.change_request: Refine the rough plan at plans/demo-plan.md into a proper structured plan following the standard format
local.intent_analysis:
- Asked: format/refactor — promote placeholder in plans/demo-plan.md into a fully structured plan matching the refine-plan template.
- Affected: plans/demo-plan.md (source), plans/drafts/<exec>.md (draft), plans/<kebab>.md (final).
- Constraints: source is intentionally meta ("rough plan for the demo"). Under-specified inputs become Open Questions, not invented requirements.
- Codeowners: no CODEOWNERS file present. Sole repo owner Jonathan Turnock is fallback reviewer.
- Acceptance: plans/<kebab>.md exists with status:refined, all required sections populated, kebab-case filename from title.
